title: THE BRANDLE METAVERSE — MASTER BIBLE INTEGRATION PACK

sections.title: 7-App Ecosystem Canon
sections.summary: Defines the seven apps and their galaxy features; aligns them with MVP-safe constraints.

sections.title: Director/Actor UX
sections.summary: Cinematic UX principle that turns procedural work into scenes while keeping receipts and trust.

sections.title: Governance & Safety
sections.summary: Permission envelopes, kill switch, data stratification, agent limits, auditability.

sections.title: Pricing & Financial Scenario
sections.summary: Tier pricing and a year-1 scenario model treated as assumptions requiring CAC/LTV validation.

sections.title: Ops Cadence
sections.summary: Hard-coded reporting cadence (The Pulse) across weekdays/weekends/quarterly.

sections.title: Visual Asset Prompts
sections.summary: Standardizes visual prompts and replaces emoji with tokens to match system output rules.

sections.title: Implementation Alignment
sections.summary: Phases BRANDLE OS into BRANDLE METAVERSE expansions (3XEC, 5ITE, 6ROXY) safely.

summary: Locks the Master Bible v1.1 into BRANDLE OS canon: 7-app ecosystem, governance/safety layer, pricing + financial scenarios, ops cadence, and visual prompt canon; reconciled with best-effort, non-legal, and no-scrape MVP constraints.
